text: Worktree agent-flood orchestration: Opus orchestrator authors per-WP specs, external/free coders (antigravity/codex/cursor/OR-free) implement in ISOLATED git worktrees and self-gate, Opus reviewer agents review each diff, orchestrator merges + final-gate + deploys. Opus NEVER writes app code. Proven on rahoot: 4 WPs (socket AI-providers, web archive/catalog, web KI-tab, MCP tools) built in parallel worktrees, reviewed (security GO + correctness fixes), merged, deployed green (edeaca9), E2E-verified. Codified as orchestrate-feature skill. User wants this as the DEFAULT for every Claude Code session on this server.
